name: Mrs Fields Party Time Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cream butter and sugar together in a medium bowl using an electric mixer set at medium speed.
3. Add extracts and beat well.
4. Scrape the bowl.
5. Add flour, chocolate chips, and almonds, and blend on low speed until just combined.
6. Do not overmix.
7. Shape rounded tablespoonfuls into 1 1/2 inch balls and place on ungreased baking sheets, 2 inches apart.
8. Press balls with the palm of your hand or bottom of a drinking glass into 1/2 inch thick rounds.
9. Bake for 15-17 minutes or until cookies just begin to brown.
10. Transfer cookies to a cool, flat surface.
